title: Compress Plus
description: Automatically compresses ores into blocks while you mine. Hold the Auto-Compressor in your offhand and watch as raw materials are instantly converted, perfect for box servers.
body:
# 🔨 CompressPlus

**CompressPlus** Automatically compresses ores into blocks while you mine. Hold the Auto-Compressor in your offhand and watch as raw materials are instantly converted, perfect for box servers.

## ✨ Features

### ⛏️ Auto-Compression System
- **Instant Conversion**: Automatically compresses 9 ores into 1 block while mining
- **Offhand Tool**: Hold the Auto-Compressor item in your offhand to activate

### 🎯 Auto-Pickup Feature
- **Instant Collection**: Mined items go directly into your inventory
- **Toggle Control**: Enable/disable through GUI or commands

### ⚙️ Complete Management
- **GUI Settings**: Easy-to-use inventory interface for toggling features
- **Simple Commands**: Easy access to all features

## 🎮 Commands

- `/givecompressor` - Get an Auto-Compressor item
- `/compressplus` - Open settings GUI
- `/autopickup` - Toggle auto-pickup feature

## 🔧 How It Works

1. **Get the Tool**: Use `/givecompressor` to obtain the Auto-Compressor
2. **Equip Properly**: Hold the compressor in your **offhand**
3. **Start Mining**: Break ore blocks as normal
4. **Auto-Compress**: When you collect 9 of any ore, they automatically convert to blocks
5. **Auto-Pickup**: Mined items go directly to inventory (when enabled)

## 📋 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21+

## 🌟 Perfect For
- **Box Servers**: Compression based servers
